raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I made an online purchase from XXXX using my Citi credit card, totaling {$440.00}. The package was scheduled for delivery to my home at XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX, PA XXXX. 

When placing the order, I left specific instructions for the delivery to be made to the front porch, where the package would be hidden from plain view. Despite these instructions, the package was reported as delivered by the shipping company. 

On the day of delivery, my father and sister arrived at the house around XXXX XXXX, approximately XXXX minutes after the delivery time. They searched the front porch and surrounding areas but did not find the package. I contacted my sister at XXXX XXXX  to check if the package had been delivered, and she confirmed that it was not there. 

I immediately contacted XXXX to report the missing package. XXXX provided images and delivery status confirming that the package had been delivered to my address. However, despite this confirmation, I believe that the package was stolen after it was delivered and left unattended on my porch. 

As of today, I have not recovered the package, and I am unable to retrieve the items I purchased. I have attempted to dispute the charge with Citi, but the dispute was closed in favor of the merchant due to the delivery confirmation provided by XXXX. 

I am filing this police report to officially document the theft of my package and to provide this report as evidence in my ongoing efforts to resolve this matter with the involved parties.
